_doc: Recommended local models for Cloud2GroundAI. Consumed by the C2G Mac app's update-nudge mechanism: on each launch, if the user's installed model is older than the recommended version OR uses a model family not on this list, the Status Panel shows a nudge to update. This file is part of the skill repo, not the watcher repo, so updates ship as part of the skill update channel.

primary.rationale: Apache 2.0 license consistent with C2G. 32K-128K context window. IBM benchmarks claim 8B beats 32B competitors for code tasks. Single family across two tiers (8b/30b) keeps skill maintenance manageable.

alternatives.rationale: Higher quality on complex multi-function generation, at ~3x the RAM cost. Recommended only for users with 32 GB+ machines.
Previous generation. Retained for backward compatibility with v0.1.x installations. New users should prefer granite4.1:8b.

_notes.update_check_cadence: C2G fetches this file when the user manually clicks 'Check for updates now' in Settings → Updates, OR once per 24h at app launch if the Stable channel is enabled.
_notes.endpoint_url: Wired into the Mac app at release time. Reference URL pattern: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/carlanotech/Cloud2GroundAI/main/recommended-models.json

field_meaning.model: Exact Ollama model identifier (use with `ollama pull <model>`).
field_meaning.family: Used to match per-model prompt wrapping / Ollama options. See protocol/SPEC.md §6.2 and §6.3.
field_meaning.size_mb: Approximate disk size of the model file.
field_meaning.min_ollama_version: Minimum Ollama version known to work with this model.
field_meaning.min_ram_gb: Minimum recommended system RAM for usable inference speed.
field_meaning.tuning_file: Path inside the skill to the tuning file for this model family.
field_meaning.released_at: Model release date per upstream publisher.
field_meaning.rationale: Why this model is on the list (or no longer is, if in deprecated).
